49.reason: [Incorrect loop logic: using 'while' assumes multiple consecutive '-' can be skipped by i+=2, but this may skip non-expansion '-' or go out of bounds. Also, after expansion, the next character printed may be wrong due to double printing.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect loop logic: using 'while' assumes multiple consecutive '-' can be skipped by i+=2, but this may skip non-expansion '-' or go out of bounds. Also, after expansion, the next character printed may be wrong due to double printing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The loop condition uses 'while' which is incorrect. It should be an 'if' because each '-' should be processed only once. Using 'while' here may cause skipping characters or infinite loops when multiple consecutive '-' are present and valid. Also, after expanding, 'i' is incremented by 2 inside the loop, but the for-loop also increments 'i', leading to skipped characters.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrect use of 'while' loop: if multiple consecutive '-' are present and valid, this skips characters incorrectly by doing i+=2 inside, but the outer 'for' loop also increments 'i', causing missed or double-processed characters. Also, accessing str[i+1] when i could be near the end may lead to out-of-bounds reads.]
